index 15a14be1..400118ca 100644

+++ b/App/Layers/W1/BaseApp/Sales/Document/SalesLineReserve.Codeunit.al
@@ -314,6 +314,11 @@ codeunit 99000832 "Sales Line-Reserve"
         if not ShouldDeleteAllReservationEntries then
             ShouldDeleteAllReservationEntries := CheckQuantityReducedOnSalesLine(NewSalesLine, OldSalesLine);
 
+        // When we have a shipment/return receipt number (combined ship/invoice or return/credit memo scenario),
+        // don't delete all reservation entries as these are prospect entries created from the shipment/receipt line
+        if ShouldDeleteAllReservationEntries and ((NewSalesLine."Shipment No." <> '') or (NewSalesLine."Return Receipt No." <> '')) then
+            ShouldDeleteAllReservationEntries := false;
+
         if ShouldDeleteAllReservationEntries then
             ReservationManagement.DeleteReservEntries(true, 0)
         else
